initialWatchTimeDesc: The minimum time to watch each streamer. Streamers who have not met this time are prioritized in the queue. *Fixed at 6 minutes to keep streak tracking.
rotationTimeDesc: The interval to switch streams when everyone in the queue has met the target time, or during normal auto mode operation.
autoStartDesc: Automatically start stream rotation when logging in or if already logged in at startup.
customInjectionsDesc: Configure custom styles, elements, and logic to inject into the Twitch window.
placeholderCSS:
/* Enter custom CSS */
nav { display: none !important; }
placeholderHTML: Overlay
languageDesc: Set the display language of the application.
placeholderInput: Enter streamer ID and press Enter
titleLogin: Login to Twitch to fetch follow list
authInstructions: Open the following URL in your browser and enter the confirmation code.
